name: libclass-method-modifiers-perl
title: libclass-method-modifiers-perl
description:
Perl module providing method modifiers
Class::Method::Modifiers provides three modifiers: before, around, and after.
The before and after modifiers are run just before and after the method they
modify, but cannot really affect that original method. The remaining modifier,
around, is run in place of the original method, with a hook to easily call the
original method.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libclass-method-modifiers-perl because Perl module providing method modifiers.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libclass-method-modifiers-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libclass-method-modifiers-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libclass-method-modifiers-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
